content: Gephi (canonical graph-exploration tool) establishes the standard feature set: degree-based node sizing (size proportional to edge count, set min/max), community coloring by modularity class (Louvain community detection), filter/hide by degree-range slider with cascading filter stacks (Gephi Lite), Appearance pane mapping color/size to attributes, and three workspaces (Overview exploration, Data Lab, Preview export). These are the table-stakes encodings for revealing hubs and clusters.
